name: Context Engine Pro
description: Advanced context management with intelligent compaction, message prioritization, and token optimization

maxContextTokens.description: Maximum context window size in tokens (0 = use model default)

compactionThreshold.description: Percentage of context window at which compaction triggers (default: 0.8 = 80%)

preserveRecentTurns.description: Minimum recent turns to always preserve during compaction (default: 5)

enableSmartSummarization.description: Use intelligent summarization that preserves key information (default: true)

priorityKeywords.description: Keywords that indicate high-priority messages to preserve during compaction

enableSubagentContext.description: Enable specialized context handling for subagent spawns (default: true)

maxSubagentContextTokens.description: Maximum tokens to pass to subagents (default: half of parent context)

maxMessagesPerSession.description: Maximum messages per session to prevent memory overflow (default: 10000)

maxContextTokens.label: Max Context Tokens
maxContextTokens.help: Override model's context window size (0 to use model default)

compactionThreshold.label: Compaction Threshold
compactionThreshold.help: Trigger compaction when context reaches this percentage (0.1-1.0)

preserveRecentTurns.label: Preserve Recent Turns
preserveRecentTurns.help: Minimum conversation turns to keep during compaction

enableSmartSummarization.label: Smart Summarization
enableSmartSummarization.help: Use AI-aware summarization that preserves critical context

priorityKeywords.label: Priority Keywords
priorityKeywords.help: Messages containing these keywords are preserved during compaction

enableSubagentContext.label: Subagent Context
enableSubagentContext.help: Optimize context passed to spawned subagents

maxSubagentContextTokens.label: Max Subagent Tokens
maxSubagentContextTokens.help: Token budget for subagent context (0 = auto)

maxMessagesPerSession.label: Max Messages Per Session
maxMessagesPerSession.help: Maximum messages per session to prevent memory overflow
